Comfortable Accommodation: Robins Nest in Drogheda offers a one-bedroom apartment with a garden and terrace. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Buvinda in Drogheda offers family rooms with private bathrooms, garden views, and free WiFi. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, electric kettle, and work desk.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can relax in the garden or on the terrace, enjoying the patio and garden views. The property features a waterpark and free on-site private parking.
Local Attractions: Located 5 km from Dowth, 6 km from Bru na Boinne Visitor Centre, and 8 km from Newgrange and Knowth. Other attractions include Slane Castle and the Hill of Slane, each 11 km away. Dublin Airport is 47 km from the homestay.
Guest Favorites: Guests highly rate the host, breakfast provided by the property, and the location of the property.

Comfortable Accommodation: Sundew Cottage in Slane offers a cosy holiday home with one bedroom and a bathroom. The property features a kitchenette, bathrobes, and a fireplace, ensuring a relaxing stay.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can enjoy a tennis court and free WiFi, perfect for active and connected travellers. Additional amenities include a private check-in and check-out service, tennis equipment hire, and free on-site parking.
Local Attractions: Located 10 km from Slane Castle and 19 km from Newgrange, the cottage provides easy access to nearby landmarks. Other attractions include the Hill of Slane and Navan Race Course, each within 20 km. Dublin Airport is 49 km away.
